articles.title_en: Massive storm and tornado damage nearly 100 homes in Russia, injuring 16
articles.lead_en: A storm tore through the Sverdlovsk region on the evening of June 22, damaging homes and power line poles. Kushva was hit hardest; the city has since been placed under a state of emergency.
articles.title_raw: Massive storm and tornado damage nearly 100 homes in Russia, injuring 16
articles.lead_raw: A storm tore through the Sverdlovsk region on the evening of June 22, damaging homes and power line poles. Kushva was hit hardest; the city has since been placed under a state of emergency.
